title: Marketplace Manager - ixigo - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - ixigo - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the ixigo family as a Marketplace Manager in Kanpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About ixigo:
ixigo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ixigo!
